description: A FULL (non-partial) `match` in a rendering context does not fire E-TYPE-081 (§18.18). The `${ match @status { .Active :> … .Inactive :> … } }` covers every variant, so there is no silent-drop hazard and E-TYPE-081 stays silent. The clean twin of e-type-081-partial-match-render-pos.
rationale: §18.18 a full exhaustive `match` produces output for every variant, so it is valid in a rendering context; E-TYPE-081 fires only on the `partial match` form there.
